===Format=== * '''Champions Gala - Season 1''' : ''June 8th - 30th ** 32 teams. *** 24 invited teams. *** 8 qualified teams. ** Squad, {{Abbr/TPP}} * '''League Stage''' : ''June 8th - 10th, 15th ** 32 teams. ** 4 matchdays. ** Teams are divided equally into 4 groups of 8 teams each. ** Round-robin format. ** {{bgcolortext|up|Top 24 teams}} qualify for ''Semi Finals. * '''Semi Finals''' : ''June 17th, 22nd - 24th ** 24 teams. ** 4 matchdays. ** Teams are divided equally into 3 groups of 8 teams each. ** Round-robin format. ** {{bgcolortext|up|Top 16 teams}} qualify for the ''Grand Finals. *
